channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped oven, Spurgeon St, SE1, 22nd July
item.description:
Oven and scooter dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-20, Spurgeon Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Both bins are even worse than reported on Tuesday., 22nd July
item.description:
Bins in park and play area are a complete mess. The whole park is also a mess. There is litter around the whole park and perimeter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobalt Close, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned scooter on yellow line roadway (also bus route). Blocking traffic and driveway access, 22nd July
item.description:
Repeat offences. Hirer should be fined and banded from further hires (there was plenty of space to park the scooter legally). The demarcated bike space is too small for the multiple hiring companies and number of bikes, sandwiched between two driveways- should be relocated to a more suitable area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Canfield Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constantly full, disgusting bin, 22nd July
item.description:
This bin is permanently full and overflowing. It means nobody else can use it, and rubbish is on the street. The bin itself is disgusting, and so is the ground around it. Can you sort this out please rather than us having to send reports all the time?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 128 Brondesbury villas, 22nd July
item.description:
Dog mess

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress on junction of Shieldhall St and McLeod Road (north side), 22nd July
item.description:
Double mattress has been dumped in the pavement just up from the junction with McLeod Road. It’s been there a couple of days now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mcleod Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and furniture dumped on corner, 22nd July
item.description:
Mattress been there since last week. Now joined by broken drawer unit
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Guild Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike and Scooter, on roadway and yellow line?( blue bus route), blocking road and driveway access, 22nd July
item.description:
Two - obstructing traffic and access - illegally parked outside designated area … there was space, so even more reason for hirer to be fined and banned for hiring in the future

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Canfield Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Back of Cavendish Close, 22nd July
item.description:
Packaging fly tipper rather than placing in the bin. Resident has left their name on the package: Shaunak Nath 12 Cavendish Close Cavendish Road NW6 7XU

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cavendish Close, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: Broken glass on pavement, 22nd July
item.description:
Glass still on pavement after last report raised

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairford Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crap dumped in Brett Close, 22nd July
item.description:
Occupants of 15 and 23 Brett Close fly tipping crap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brett Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish left by bins, 22nd July
item.description:
15 bags of household rubbish left by public litter bins , foxes pulled it all out , potentially dangerous for children attending local school
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foxgrove Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and food waste all over street again, 22nd July
item.description:
Out side number 1 oakmere rd a continuing problem as they dump the there rubbish in the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oakmere Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Salusbury road outside pharmacy, 22nd July
item.description:
Food bin is bursting with food. Needs emptying and cleaning around the bin. Unsanitary and unsightly. These bins either needs to be maintained properly or removed. Disgusting.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped rubbish bags, 22nd July
item.description:
At 6:05ish a LWB white Mercedes van with non UK licence plates pulled up and dumped several bags of rubbish on the street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linkfield, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned and Untaxed vehicle, 22nd July
item.description:
Abandoned and untaxed vehicle that has been parked there for weeks. Tyres are flat, and abandoned in a residents parking bay. Blue Vauxhall Registration GN17OSO

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Defoe Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 22nd July
item.description:
Waste dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oulton Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair sideboard cabinet and bedding, 22nd July
item.description:
Been there for a couple of days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Richborough Close, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden fencing, 22nd July
item.description:
Dumped behind Gardens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Richborough Close, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roots affecting footpath, Tabard St, SE1, 22nd July
item.description:
Uneven paving and roots look like near manhole cover and could be affecting that

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
